    Methods in org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.variable that return VariableMap
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static VariableMap
    Variables.createVariables()
    Returns a new VariableMap instance.
    static VariableMap
    Variables.fromMap(Map<String,Object> map)
    If the given map is not a variable map, adds all its entries as untyped values to a new VariableMap.
    VariableMap
    VariableMap.putValue(String name, Object value)
